sections.name: Burning Mammoth Longshield
sections.text: This creature did not include a description.

traits.name: Uncommon
traits.text: Something of uncommon rarity requires special training or comes from a particular culture or part of the world. Some character choices give access to uncommon options, and the GM can choose to allow access for anyone. Less is known about uncommon creatures than common creatures. They typically can't be summoned. The DC of Recall Knowledge checks related to these creature is increased by 2.

traits.name: Evil
traits.text: Evil effects often manipulate energy from evil-aligned Outer Planes and are antithetical to good divine servants or divine servants of good deities. A creature with this trait is evil in alignment.

traits.name: Human
traits.text: A creature with this trait is a member of the human ancestry. Humans are a diverse array of people known for their adaptability. An ability with this trait can be used or selected only by humans.

traits.name: Humanoid
traits.text: Humanoid creatures reason and act much like humans. They typically stand upright and have two arms and two legs.

automatic_abilities.name: Shield Block
automatic_abilities.text: A longshield can use Shield Block to prevent fire damage in addition to physical damage.

universal_monster_ability.effect: The monster snaps its shield into place to deflect a blow. The shield prevents the monster from taking an amount of damage up to the shield’s Hardness. The monster and the shield each take any remaining damage, possibly breaking or destroying the shield.
universal_monster_ability.name: Shield Block
universal_monster_ability.trigger: The monster has its shield raised and takes damage from a physical attack.

automatic_abilities.name: Spurred by Death
automatic_abilities.trigger: An ally within 30 feet reduces a creature to 0 HP

traits.name: Thrown
traits.text: You can throw this weapon as a ranged attack, and it is a ranged weapon when thrown. A thrown weapon adds your Strength modifier to damage just like a melee weapon does. When this trait appears on a melee weapon, it also includes the range increment. Ranged weapons with this trait use the range increment specified in the weapon’s Range entry.

ability.name: Opportunistic Defense
ability.trigger: The longshield successfully Strikes with their shield boss

ability.effect: The longshield rolls an Athletics check to Shove a creature in reach. If they roll a failure, they get a success instead, and if they roll a success, they get a critical success instead. The longshield's shield is lowered.
ability.name: Shield Shove
